summary: Comprehensive testing of Live Chat and Website Analytics features. All backend APIs pass (16/16). Frontend Live Chat widget works correctly. Fixed URL mismatch bug in frontend (was using /api/analytics/website/* instead of /api/website/*). Fixed URL parsing error in WebsiteAnalytics.jsx.

live_chat_public_settings.evidence: Returns enabled, welcome_message, theme_color, position, page_messages

live_chat_session_start.evidence: Creates new session with session_id, returns welcome message

live_chat_send_message.evidence: Visitor message saved, AI response generated via Gemini

live_chat_admin_sessions.evidence: Returns list of chat sessions with unread counts

live_chat_admin_reply.evidence: Admin can send replies to chat sessions

website_analytics_live.evidence: Returns live visitor count and details

website_analytics_stats.evidence: Returns total_views, unique_visitors, top_pages, devices, countries

chat_widget_on_shop.evidence: Chat widget button visible on /shop, /shop/tiles, /shop/contact pages

chat_widget_opens.evidence: Chat window opens when button clicked, shows welcome message

chat_ai_response.evidence: AI responds to visitor messages with helpful information about tiles

admin_live_chat_page.evidence: Shows stats cards, conversations list, message view, reply input

admin_website_analytics_page.evidence: Shows live visitors, stats cards, top pages, devices, countries, traffic sources

bugs_fixed.issue: Wrong API URL - was using /api/analytics/website/track instead of /api/website/track
Wrong API URLs - was using /api/analytics/website/* instead of /api/website/*
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed all 5 API URLs to correct paths

bugs_fixed.issue: URL parsing error - new URL(visitor.referrer) threw error for invalid URLs
bugs_fixed.fix: Added try-catch wrapper around URL parsing

critical_code_review_comments: All Live Chat and Website Analytics features are working correctly
AI responses via Gemini are generating helpful, contextual replies
WebSocket connections for real-time updates are functional
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Chat and Website Analytics features are fully functional. Chat widget appears on shop pages, AI responses work via Gemini. Admin can view and manage chat sessions. Website Analytics tracks page views and shows real-time visitor data. Fixed URL mismatch bugs in frontend code.
